actor_claims.quote_text: WDC represented in the merger agreement that it has (and at the closing of the merger will have) sufficient cash to enable it to pay the merger consideration

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: WDC represented in the merger agreement that it has (and at the closing of the merger will have) sufficient cash to enable it to pay the merger consideration
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: represented that it has and at closing will have sufficient cash to pay the merger consideration

actor_relation_claims.object_label: transactions contemplated by the merger agreement
actor_relation_claims.quote_text: sufficient cash to enable it to pay the merger consideration and to perform its other obligations under the merger agreement with respect to the transactions contemplated by the merger agreement
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: sufficient cash to pay merger consideration and perform other obligations

event_claims.description: WDC represented that it has and at closing will have sufficient cash to pay the merger consideration and perform its other obligations under the merger agreement.
event_claims.quote_text: WDC represented in the merger agreement that it has (and at the closing of the merger will have) sufficient cash to enable it to pay the merger consideration and to perform its other obligations under the merger agreement with respect to the transactions contemplated by the merger agreement
